headline: CrowdStrike Unveils Continuous Identity for AI Agents
summary: AUSTIN, Texas & LAS VEGAS, June 15, 2026--Identiverse 2026 – CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) today announced Continuous Identity for AI Agents, a new CrowdStrike Falcon® Next-Gen Identity Security capability that reinforces the CrowdStrike Falcon® platform as the identity security control plane for the agentic enterprise.
